topics: Verification of Superposition theorem
Verification of Thevenin's theorem and Maximum Power Transfer theorem; Calculation of Norton's equivalent circuit (calculation only)
Determination of impedance, admittance and power factor in RLC series/parallel circuit and study of the effect of reactive components on power factor
Measurement of two port network parameters
Step response of RLC circuit (using DSO)
3-phase power measurement using one-wattmeter and two-wattmeter methods and determination of reactive/apparent power drawn
Resistance measurement using Wheatstone's bridge and extension of range of voltmeters
Extension of instrument range using instrument transformers (CT and PT)
Calibration of 1-phase Energy meter at various power factors and phantom loading
Calibration of 3-phase Energy meter using standard wattmeter
Determination of B-H curve, μ-H curve and μ-B curve of a magnetic specimen
Measurement of self inductance, mutual inductance and coupling coefficient of a 1-phase transformer
Measurement of capacitance, inductance and frequency using AC bridges
Determination of characteristics of thermal sensors (Thermistor, Thermocouple and RTD)
Determination of P-V characteristics of solar PV array and determination of fill factor (study of partial shading may be included)
Determination of insulation resistance and earth resistance
Calibration of meters (Ammeter/Voltmeter) using potentiometers
Determination of characteristics of transducers (LVDT, Strain gauge, and Load-cell)
Simulation of circuits using software platforms like PSpice/LT spice/MATLAB/Multisim
Implementation of IoT-based data acquisition system

Demo Experiments: Measurement of energy using TOD meter/Digital meters/Bidirectional meter; Measurement of electrical variables and frequency using CRO and DSO; Harmonic analysers; Instrumentation systems for Gas/Fire/Smoke Detection Systems; Virtual instrumentation experiments using LABVIEW
